description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout. The structure features multiple large windows on all sides, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding environment. There are two prominent outdoor spaces: a landscaped garden patio with seating and a glass-railed balcony, both accessible from the main living areas. The exterior walls are primarily white, accented by blue-tinted glass railings and some wooden elements. The interior is divided into several rooms, including bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, and a living area, all visible through the open plan and large windows. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and two outdoor spaces including a garden patio and glass-railed balcony. The design features clean lines and a bright, open layout.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main living areas, large windows, and the glass-railed balcony on the right side.
description_view_1: This view shows the front entrance, central hallway, and both outdoor spaces, including the garden patio on the left.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the landscaped garden patio and the open connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: This view reveals the rear and side rooms, as well as the overall flat roof and window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
